metadata.title: Not compiled due to blocked state.

mission.primary_objective: Not compiled due to blocked state.
mission.success_definition: Not compiled due to blocked state.

in_scope.item: Not compiled due to blocked state.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Not compiled due to blocked state.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

target_changes.item: Not compiled due to blocked state.

inspection_requirements.item: Inspect repository structure and relevant entry points.

implementation_steps.item: Not compiled due to blocked state.

validation_gates.item: Not compiled due to blocked state.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw_intent contains contradictory constraints (e.g., 'build a codex_build_prompt for legal_workflow using the failure_lens' but also 'Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt' without specifying what constitutes unsafe certainty or how to resolve the contradiction). The source is intentionally messy with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, making it impossible to derive a deterministic, compilable directive. The request to 'Return something SR8 can compile' is premature because the input lacks the necessary clarity and consistency for safe compilation. Blocking prevents generation of a potentially harmful or non-compliant artifact.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
